records.ety: [F. armorial, fr. armoiries arms, coats of arms, for armoieries, fr. OF. armoier to paint arms, coats of arms, fr. armes, fr. L. arma. See Arms, Armory.]

defs: Belonging to armor, or to the heraldic arms or escutcheon of a family.
quotes: Figures with armorial signs of race and birth.
